steps.title: Supply the main verb
steps.content: The subject is plural: "emulsifiers such as cetyl hydroxyethylcellulose." The sentence needs a finite verb that agrees with that subject and completes the independent clause before the phrase "to blend oil and water."

steps.title: Reject nonfinite forms
steps.content: Choice B is only a past participle without an auxiliary. Choice C creates a relative clause and leaves the sentence fragmentary. Choice D is a participial phrase, not a main verb. The remaining choice is a finite plural passive verb. The answer is A.
